1101001110000100 0111011011011110 0 -> sum: 0100101001100010, cout: 1
1000010000001101 0101110110000101 0 -> sum: 1110000110010010, cout: 0
1111010111100111 1110111100100101 0 -> sum: 1110010100001100, cout: 1

0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
